description: A non-fungible token (NFT) is a unique cryptographic token representing an asset, functioning as a verifiable proof of authenticity and ownership on a blockchain. NFTs are non-interchangeable, introducing scarcity, unlike fungible assets such as fiat currencies and cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin.
topic_summary: This video explains NFTs, highlighting their uniqueness, role as digital certificates, and comparison with fungible assets like Bitcoin [t=3:76].
